verse.name: v1
verse.lines: In Your presence there is fullness of joy, In Your presence is the new wine and oil, And in Your presence is where I long to be, Father draw me, Draw me near to where You are.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: For You are Holy, so Holy, And I worship before You now, Lord, You are Holy, so Holy, Spirit of God breathe on us now.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Consume me Lord by the fire of Your Spirit. Consume me Lord And make me more like You. Won't You break me Lord And bless the broken pieces of my life; Let me be used, Lord, by You!
